description: Style NoteAdd a sophisticated polish to your minimalist look this season with this lucera ring. Styled to refine your ensemble, don't save it just for the special dates - wear this with your denim and tee staples too. Up the style bar with this trendy piece and style it with tonal accessories.   Product DetailsWide silver band with cut-outs at the centreBlack central inset encrusted with multicoloured gemsMaterial and CareSilver, CZ diamondsWipe with a cotton swab to remove dust
